narratives.narrative: Threat actor CDB-RAN-02 has been observed in 2 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1530, T1547.001, T1190, T1486, T1078. Average risk score: 10.0/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-MOB-01 has been observed in 2 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1195, T1475, T1476, T1566.002, T1566. Average risk score: 10.0/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-FIN-09 has been observed in 2 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1195, T1555, T1547, T1566, T1059. Average risk score: 10.0/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-APT-41 has been observed in 2 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1476, T1059.001, T1566, T1190, T1059. Average risk score: 10.0/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-FIN-11 has been observed in 2 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1021, T1566, T1068, T1190, T1199. Average risk score: 10.0/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-APT-22 has been observed in 9 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1195, T1555, T1566.001, T1566, T1547. Average risk score: 9.8/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

findings.recommendation: Migrate to ML-KEM (CRYSTALS-Kyber) for key exchange

stix_transport.note: TLS 1.3 uses ECDHE — quantum vulnerable for key exchange

jwt_tokens.note: Symmetric crypto — quantum resistant (Grover halves keyspace)

S9_Quantum.recommendation: Begin hybrid key exchange deployment. Inventory all RSA/ECDSA usage for PQC migration.
